description: TouchDesigner-specific GLSL knowledge for shader development

TDOutputSwizzle.description: Ensures correct color channel mapping for cross-platform support. Always use when writing color to output.

TDPerlinNoise.description: Returns Perlin noise value between -1 and 1. Deterministic for same input.

TDSimplexNoise.description: Returns Simplex noise value between -1 and 1. Faster than Perlin.

TDDither.description: Apply dithering to reduce color banding artifacts

TDTranslate.signature: mat4 TDTranslate(float x, float y, float z)

TDRotateOnAxis.description: Rotate around arbitrary axis (axis must be normalized)

TDScale.signature: mat3 TDScale(float x, float y, float z)

TDRotateToVector.description: Create rotation from +Z to forward direction

signatures: void TDImageStoreOutput(uint index, ivec3 coord, vec4 color)
void TDImageStoreOutput(uint index, uvec3 coord, vec4 color)
TDImageStoreOutput.description: Write color to compute shader output. Handles sRGB automatically. No TDOutputSwizzle needed.

TDImageLoadOutput.description: Read from compute shader output texture

TDTexInfo.definition: struct TDTexInfo { vec4 res; vec4 depth; }

texture_info.uTDOutputInfo: uniform TDTexInfo uTDOutputInfo - output texture resolution

rendering_state.uTDCurrentDepth: uniform int - current slice index when rendering 3D/2DArray
rendering_state.uTDPass: uniform int - current render pass (starts at 0)

built_in_constants.TD_NUM_CUBE_INPUTS: Number of cube map inputs connected

vUV.description: Texture coordinates for current pixel (pixel shader only). vUV.st for 2D coords.
vUV.note: Only available if not using custom vertex shader

get_input_resolution.code:
float width = uTD2DInfos[0].res.z;
float height = uTD2DInfos[0].res.w;

sample_neighbor_pixels.description: Sample adjacent pixels for effects like blur
